items.title: With Gemini Powering Apple's Siri, Alphabet Could Soon Be the Undisputed AI Leader
items.description: The new collaboration gives Alphabet the AI momentum it needs.

items.title: Wall Street Logs Worst Day Since October, Gold Shines Amid Trump's Tariff Threat
items.description: Wall Street's equity benchmarks posted their biggest one-day losses in more than three months on Tue

items.title: Big Tech Stocks Hit Hard in Selloff
items.description: All seven of the giant tech stocks known as the Magnificent Seven fell at least 1% Tuesday. That was the first time that has happened since October.    Microsoft was down the least, about 1.2%, with Tesla and Nvidia down 4% or more.

items.title: Top Stock Reports for Apple, Walmart & JPMorgan
items.description: Apple, Walmart and JPMorgan lead today's Zacks research, highlighting services growth, omnichannel strength and banking momentum amid risks.

items.title: Nvidia's place in AI, Apple downgrade, JPMorgan cautious on oil
items.description: Market Domination Host Josh Lipton and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma track several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including Nvidia's (NVDA) position in the AI ecosystem, Citi analysts cutting their price target on Apple (AAPL), and JPMorgan's cautious outlook on the oil industry (CL=F, BZ=F). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
